title: [Nyessem, Promenade]
description: The walkway narrows here, set between a white stone wall lined with marble sculptures of Nyessemian women and one carved with arch-shaped hollows.  Velvet-threaded curtains are cinched above the hollows, over a pale violet stone arch.  At one end of the walkway is a narrow slope alongside a polished white stone fireplace.  The other end leads back to the promenade's main square.  Above, a pale blue mist mimicking a cloudy sky flows like milky water.
